texto: The Internet is the hope of an integrated world without frontiers, a common world without controlling owners, a world of opportunities and equality. This is a utopia that we have been dreaming about and is a world in which each and every one of us are protagonists of a destiny that we have in our hands.
explicacao: Citação de Laura Chinchilla sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “The Internet is the hope of an integrated world without frontiers, a common world without control…” articula motivacao, esperanca, opportunities em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como opportunities e world.

frase_original: The Internet is the hope of an integrated world without frontiers, a common world without controlling owners, a world of opportunities and equality. This is a utopia that we have been dreaming about and is a world in which each and every one of us are protagonists of a destiny that we have in our hands.

texto: When you face unexpected events, you have to try to overcome those problems, but at the same time, you have to continue working according to the plan that you defined since the beginning. So that's what we have tried to do - not to avoid the urgent responses but to continue the route that we had defined.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Laura Chinchilla sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “When you face unexpected events, you have to try to overcome those problems, but at the same time…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a superacao, problems, beginning, útil em momentos de trabalho e beginning.

So that's what we have tried to do - not to avoid the urgent responses but to continue the route that we had defined.
